mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, causing investors to sell equities and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in > 65% of instances when the unemployment threshold is breached.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate earnings growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in both series fails to produce a positive return frequency above 55% over the 60-day horizon.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side momentum, which translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) when inflation exceeds 5% annually.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns occur in > 60% of high-inflation trigger months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market expansion, supporting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields a negative return frequency above 50% during periods of wage-price spirals.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding economic output and corporate revenue potential, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero (p > 0.10) following positive GDP revisions.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the industrial production index below the 98.0 threshold signals manufacturing weakness and supply chain disruptions, triggering short-term equity sell-offs and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in > 55% of instances when the threshold is breached.
